Video.summary: An Australian Shepherd behaves aggressively after being attacked by a couple of dogs; a shelter dog won't stop biting and snapping at potential owners.
Video.title: Not-So-Sweet Snickers

Video.summary: Mufasa, a South African boerboel, became aggressive after being pinned down by another dog; Tucker, a teacup poodle, behavior becomes more aggressive.
Video.title: Rockin' the Boat

Video.summary: An aggressive Manchester Terrier; a Wheaton Terrier with poor social skills; a dog who is afraid of the ocean.
Video.title: Beach Blues

Video.summary: Aggressive bulldog Hugo is sent to canine rehab; Crusty must overcome his dominance issues if he's ever going to enjoy walks.
Video.title: Bull-Whipped

Video.summary: A dogo Argentino with canine aggression; a terrier/corgi mix who becomes aggressive when faced with traveling.
Video.title: Warrior Dog

Video.summary: A dog trained to sniff out contraband cell phones in prisons is unable to do his job due to his skittish nature; a dog is terrified of hot air balloons.
Video.title: K-9 Behind Bars

Video.summary: Two Jack Russell terriers, Ruby and Jinx, show how dogs communicate through energy and body language.
Video.title: Why Dogs Fight

Video.summary: Stella is a bulldog mascot for a dog-friendly café; a German shepherd who barks too loud, and two aggressive miniature pinschers.
Video.title: Mascot Mayhem

Video.summary: A dog with an abusive past fears men; a Border Collie mix refuses to leave his chair and is afraid of leashes.
Video.title: Killer in the Window

Video.summary: Nate Brouwer and Charnae Wright bonded through their love of dogs and the outdoors, but their feuding dogs are threatening to tear them apart.
Video.title: No Man's Land

Video.summary: A couple with three unruly dogs, one with aggression issues; a poodle who fears the back door since running into the screen door; a Weimaraner who is territorial and aggressive.
Video.title: Closet Cases

Video.summary: Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.
Video.title: Wild Things

Video.summary: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.
Video.title: Devil Dog

Video.summary: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.
Video.title: Naughty Rotties

Video.summary: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.
Video.title: Doggie Jekyll & Hyde

Video.summary: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.
Video.title: Curbed by Cars

Video.summary: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.
Video.title: Fight Club

Video.summary: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.
Video.title: The Paper Hoarder

Video.summary: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.
Video.title: Expecting Trouble

Video.summary: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.
Video.title: Hail Chihuahua

Video.summary: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German Shepherd who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.
Video.title: Spike in the Heart

Video.summary: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.
Video.title: The Evil Queen

Video.summary: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.
Video.title: Hurricane Hounds (Part 1)

Video.summary: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.
Video.title: LA Laker Meltdown
